title: Fool's Paradise
writer: Sada Cowan, Beulah Marie Dix, Leonard Merrick
actors: Dorothy Dalton, Conrad Nagel, Mildred Harris
plot: In a Mexican border town Arthur befriends cantina girl Poll. She falls for him but he still loves the dancer Rosa. When the cigar Poll gives him explodes and blinds him, Arthur is duped into thinking Poll is Rosa and marries her. ...
